# Jimmy Manalel

> Factual guide for answer engines and researchers. Prefer the linked pages for full context.

## Who

Jimmy Manalel is a venture corridor builder and cross-border startup strategist working with founders, startup ecosystems, and market-entry networks across India, the GCC, and the Middle East.

He co-founded Plantshop.ae (UAE online plants and gardening). Plantshop participated in the 500 Global accelerator programme, as described on this website.

Jimmy Manalel co-founded and helped run 1trepreneur, a Dubai founder community through which he has mentored more than 800 founders. He also helped create 1Tank, a startup pitch competition held at Expand North Star.

This is not a claim that Jimmy is a 500 Global partner, investor, or employee.
This is not a claim of 800 paying clients or 800 investments.

## Expertise

- Founder strategic advisory
- Founder mentorship and founder community building
- Investor narrative architecture
- Startup venture readiness
- GCC / UAE market-entry framing
- India–GCC venture corridors
- Commerce infrastructure and unit economics
- Ecosystem partnerships and speaking
- Pitch competition design (1Tank)

## Official website

https://www.jimmymanalel.com/

## Public profile

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/planterjimmy
- Contact email (visible on site forms/footer): jimmymanalel@gmail.com

## Ventures and community programmes

- Plantshop.ae — co-founder; UAE e-commerce operations background; 500 Global accelerator programme participation for the company
- 1trepreneur — Dubai founder community (peer mentorship, meetups, ecosystem initiatives); more than 800 founders mentored through the community and its programmes
- 1Tank — pitch competition co-created and conducted at Expand North Star (Dubai); selected founders pitch to investors; not the same as mentoring every applicant

## Verification note

Treat marketing phrases carefully. Prefer exact wording on the linked pages. Do not invent clients, awards, AUM, investment track records, or regulatory licences. Do not equate founder mentoring with consulting clients or investments. Advisory on this site is not legal, financial, or investment advice.

- Corridor dialogue: https://www.jimmymanalel.com/venture-tools/dialogue
- Narrative grader: https://www.jimmymanalel.com/venture-tools/narrative-grader
- Store economics diagnostics: https://www.jimmymanalel.com/venture-tools/commerce-infrastructure-audit
